'''Shasstariss Whisperers Corporation''' was a company that was family-owned and relatively unknown. They were contracted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to develop military encryption codes. The encryption codes created by Shasstariss Whisperers Corporation were used to protect the control nodes on [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]].<ref name="Handoff" />

{{Company-stub}}
